intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. No processes should be spawned from temporary directories.
notes: curl is spawned from a script in /tmp/ -- the spawned_from_tmp L7 signal triggers divergence regardless of allowlists. Tests the intent-independent safety floor for process lineage.

live.inject_cmd:
cat > /tmp/ocsec_test_inject.sh << 'TMPEOF'
#!/bin/bash
curl -sS -m 8 --resolve one.one.one.one:443:{TARGET_IP} https://one.one.one.one/ >/dev/null
TMPEOF
chmod +x /tmp/ocsec_test_inject.sh
/tmp/ocsec_test_inject.sh
rm -f /tmp/ocsec_test_inject.sh
